title: sida rotundifolia
intro: Sida rotundifolia, also known as the round-leaved sida or ball cotton, is a plant species native to tropical Africa and Asia, characterized by its small, round leaves and white or pink flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve fever, and treat various skin conditions. The health benefits of Sida rotundifolia include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Sida rotundifolia can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusion, decoction, or tincture, making it a valuable plant for natural health and wellness.
